change_intent: Prove the narrated Record & Replay plugin suite has a coherent capture-first journey before live dogfood claims are made.
primary_user: Codex agent operating for Tree or a narrated plugin user
user_job: Start a narrated capture without form-style intake, then let the agent infer the target task from aligned replay evidence and narration.
product_promise: The plugin captures first, keeps private audio and transcript data local, and routes to the right narrated workflow only after packet review.
business_or_user_outcome: Users can show and narrate agent work without losing timing context or being interrupted before the recording teaches the task.

primary_journey.start: User invokes the core narrated plugin or a companion narrated skill.
primary_journey.end: Agent has a claim-bounded packet review and either proceeds with the inferred task or asks a targeted post-review question.

steps.user_action: Invoke narrated Record & Replay or a companion narrated skill.
steps.system_response: Starts the capture-first path and does not ask target, output, duration, or microphone intake questions before recording.
steps.engine_truth: Skill contracts and the local gate enforce capture-first and no pre-recording intake behavior.

steps.user_action: Finish recording and let the agent inspect generated packet artifacts.
steps.system_response: Uses aligned final transcript, timing artifacts, Record & Replay events, privacy boundaries, and mismatch warnings before choosing the workflow.
steps.engine_truth: Transcript text is intent context; Record & Replay events remain the action evidence surface.

surface_map.role: General gateway that starts capture first and routes after packet review.
Task-specific guidance for feature implementation, workflow capture, bug report, and review debrief after capture.

human_attention_policy.automation_expectation: The agent should start bounded capture, inspect artifacts, classify route, and use confidence/mismatch evidence before asking the user.
human_attention_policy.overuse_risk: If the plugin asks target/output/duration questions before recording, the product journey has failed even if the helper can record.

supported: static product cohesion and package routing for the capture-first plugin suite
claim_ceiling.rationale: This receipt proves static journey coherence and local gate coverage only. Live dogfood remains the proof surface for runtime claims.

review.method: same-round four-person harness review plus deterministic target-repo receipt audit
